title: crepis × muretiana
intro: Crepis × muretiana, also known as the Muret's hawksbeard, is a hybrid plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that combines Crepis biennis and Crepis foetida. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The health benefits of Crepis × muretiana include reducing menstrual cramps, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system, while its herbal preparations typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and roots. Crepis × muretiana is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
